task_completion.description: Load the ToothGrowth dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window displays the ToothGrowth dataset with columns such as 'len', 'supp', and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: Set the target variable and predictors for Boosting Classification
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Boosting Classification analysis panel, 'supp' is placed in the Target box, and 'len' and 'dose' are placed in the Predictors box.

task_completion.description: Configure the test set split to 30%
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Split section of the analysis panel, the Test set proportion is set to 0.3 or 30%.

task_completion.description: Set the model parameters to 50 trees and 0.1 shrinkage
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Training Parameters section, 'Number of Trees' (or similar) is set to 50, and 'Shrinkage' is set to 0.1.

task_completion.description: Include the confusion matrix, ROC curve, and out-of-bag improvement plot
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Plots section, the checkboxes for 'Confusion matrix', 'ROC curve', and 'Out-of-bag improvement' are checked, or these specific plots are visible in the JASP results pane.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'BoostingClassification.jasp' in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/', or the JASP window title reflects this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP graphical interface, not terminal commands or scripts.
The results pane displays authentic JASP formatted tables and plots, not manually typed text or mockups.
The application window clearly belongs to JASP, identifiable by its layout, icons, and branding.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target variable: 'supp'. Predictors: 'len', 'dose'. Test split: 30% (0.3). Number of trees: 50. Shrinkage: 0.1. Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BoostingClassification.jasp.
